headline: Gartner Survey Finds 49% of U.S. Consumers Say GenAI Has Made Content Quality Worse
summary: DENVER, June 09, 2026--Forty-nine percent of U.S. consumers agree that GenAI has made the quality of content available worse, according to a survey by Gartner, Inc., a business and technology insights company. Among younger consumers, including Gen Z and millennials, 57% agree that GenAI has made content quality worse.
